ctxMarket: Attention is on Solana’s new onchain primitives for subscriptions and allowances, as well as growing momentum around derivatives and tokenized assets. Multiple teams are leveraging these features, with institutional and retail interest in new product categories.
ctxTalking:
• Solana’s launch of native recurring payments and delegated spending capabilities
• Expansion of perpetual futures and derivatives infrastructure, with Kalshi and Solana Foundation initiatives
• Oro’s push to tokenize gold markets using Solana’s network
ctxMatters: These developments broaden Solana’s use cases for both consumer and institutional users. Recurring payments and delegated spending could streamline business models and user experiences. The focus on derivatives and tokenized assets signals deeper financialization and more sophisticated products on Solana.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Native support for subscriptions and allowances, and institutional moves toward onchain derivatives and tokenized commodities.
Noise: Speculation around which altcoins will be included in new futures offerings.
ctxGlossary:
Perpetual futures — Derivative contracts with no expiration date, allowing continuous trading.
Tokenized gold — Digital representation of gold on a blockchain, enabling 24/7 trading and global access.

readMore.title: Solana Now Has Native Subscriptions & Allowances
Kalshi Eyes Perpetual Futures for XRP, Solana, Dogecoin—And These Altcoins
